perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman is seen eating a snack while a split-screen shows coffee being poured into a bowl of instant noodles. (2) The woman holds up a bowl of spicy beef ramen and a bottle of Cafe Plaza coffee, introducing the ingredients. (3) She prepares the dish by pouring hot water into the ramen, followed by coffee and milk. (4) She stirs the mixture and takes a large bite, exhibiting expressions of shock and then intense satisfaction. (5) She holds up two variations of the Cafe Plaza coffee bottles (white and blue) while speaking to the camera. (6) She is seen eating a chocolate roll cake and drinking the coffee, showing how well they pair. (7) The video ends with her eating the ramen with great appetite.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, jaunty acoustic-pop background music track starts and plays throughout. (2) A female voice begins speaking in an energetic, high-pitched Mandarin tone, narrating the process. (3) Sound effects like 'ding', 'pop', and 'slurping' noises are heard as text overlays appear and the character eats. (4) The music remains consistent in volume as the speaker transitions into a promotional message about a store discount.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '韓網上已經超有名！！ 韓國泡麵加咖啡牛奶' (Super famous on Korean internet!! Korean ramen plus coffee milk) - Hook text. (2) '準備辣牛肉泡麵' (Prepare spicy beef ramen) - Functional instruction. (3) '加！ 加牛奶' (Add! Add milk) - Functional instruction. (4) '（收到衝擊） 真假' (Shocked. Really?) - Decorative/Emotional text. (5) '變成高級料理的感覺！' (Feels like high-end cuisine!) - Hook/Review text. (6) '咖啡廣場 奶香特調咖啡 / 調合式冰咖啡' (Cafe Plaza Milk Coffee / Blended Ice Coffee) - Functional product names. (7) '2瓶49元' (2 bottles for 49 NTD) - Promotional functional text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Step-by-step Tutorial -> Taste Test Review -> Product Introduction -> Retail Promotion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator performing the food review
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a simple grey long-sleeved shirt, with a lively and expressive facial style.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with beige walls and soft lighting, focused entirely on the creator and the food items.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Recipe -> Reaction -> Cross-Promotion -> Call-to-Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote 'Cafe Plaza' coffee by demonstrating its unexpected versatility as an ingredient in a trending Korean ramen hack, as well as its traditional pairing with desserts, while announcing a specific 7-Eleven retail promotion.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker directly names the brand, displays the bottles throughout, and provides specific pricing information for a retail chain.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy reaction faces and 'Mukbang' style slurping sounds.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages 'social proof' by mentioning the trend's popularity in Korea to validate the product's use in unconventional ways.
